turn.content: Aaaa... ahh, please, not... not both of us. Please. My wife... my family. I've got a dog at home, I...
Wait, how do you know my clock's not counting down too?! Maybe I'm the one you're supposed to kill, not him! Let me go! Let me check it, see if...
N-no, wait, don't... don't think like that. He's not going to... oh god, what have I done? Do you have family too? Do you...

What are you talking about, do I have family?! Of course, I do! I have a mom, a stepdad, my friends... what does it matter now? You're not going to die and I'm going to die?! No, no way, I won't be a sacr—

Ahahahaha, the desperation is lovely. Six minutes. You think it matters if I have family or not? The only thing that matters is the decision you two make. And the truth is, it's not about you or them, it's about you killing each other. You're more concerned with who's going to die than with living itself. Five minutes. Start making your choices, play nice.
O-oh god... no, no, please, it's not supposed to be like this. This isn't... this doesn't count, does it? There has to be more, I just got to... to... what about... my wife! Please don't, no!
No, he's manipulating us, he doesn't care about my life or yours! I don't even know you, I'm not killing you! Let me see your face... show yourself to me, take that thing off...
No, don't, Kaelie, please... he'll kill us... we have to... we have to think, just a minute... I'll try... my wife's name... it's Samantha... Samantha, if... if I don't get home... she...

message: Run failed (gen 1, variant 0) — Groq API may be unavailable.
